name: Ankr
description: Ankr — Decentralized Web3 infrastructure provider offering RPC endpoints for 40+ blockchains and staking services.

seo.title: Ankr — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Ankr: Ankr — Decentralized Web3 infrastructure provider offering RPC endpoints for 40+ blockchains and staking services.

when_to_use: Multi-chain RPC endpoints for Web3 wallet backend
Decentralized node infrastructure for DeFi protocol
Staking API integration for crypto exchange
40+ chain support for cross-chain analytics tool
Cost-effective RPC as alternative to centralized providers

pros: Staking and node services in one vendor
cons: Support slower than Alchemy or QuickNode
review.verdict: Solid multichain RPC at a better price than Alchemy, but consistency dips outside the top chains.
review.best_for: Multichain dapps needing broad RPC coverage at a lower unit cost
review.not_for: Teams wanting white-glove support or deep per-chain enriched APIs
